commitMessage:
docs(sprint-c): Sprint B caveat CLOSED in prod — final delivery docs

Captures the closure of Sprint B's iyzico /api/payment/create 500 caveat
in production. The actual root cause was NOT the NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL
issue originally suspected in Sprint C P2/P3. It was a Vercel lambda
file tracing issue: iyzipay's lib/resources/ + 71 transitive deps were
missing from the production bundle because Turbopack's nft cannot follow
iyzipay's dynamic fs.readdirSync + require() chain.

Discovery timeline:
- Sprint C deploy #1 (595d7b8) exposed the real error via `vercel logs`:
  ENOENT: scandir '/var/task/node_modules/iyzipay/lib/resources'
- Sprint C deploy #2 (b683a2d) — 1st fix, iyzipay/lib glob include
  closed scandir error, exposed: Cannot find module 'postman-request'
- Sprint C deploy #3 (95bcadc) — final fix, 71 transitive deps added
  to outputFileTracingIncludes, HTTP 200 in production ✅

Final production deployment: dpl_E9YTfCv4X18i7UsWZb79CpBoBkaR
Final production commit: 95bcadc (matches local HEAD)

Produc
